examples.text: فِي ذِرَاعِ ٱلْإِنْسَانِ ثَلَاثَةُ عِظَامٍ: اِثْنَتَانِ فِي ٱلسَّاعِدِ ٱسْمَاهُمَا ٱلزَّنْدُ وَٱلْكُعْبُرَةُ وَوَاحِدَةٌ فِي ٱلْعَضُدِ.
examples.english: There are three bones in the human arm: two in the lower arm (called the ulna and the radius) and one in the upper arm.

senses.gloss: something or someone that gives man strength, assistant etc.
side, lateral, brink, border, region, quarter, area, tract, boundary

examples.text: لوجع الْأَسْنَان وضع ورق الكبيكج على عضد العليل من جَانب سنه العليل سكن الوجع من سَاعَة وَإِن أحدث فِي العصب قرحَة فَيَنْبَغِي أَن يعالج بعد ذَلِك.
examples.english: For tooth-ache put leaves of spearwort onto the ill spot from the side of the aching tooth and it will attain relief from the ache within an hour and if a sore spawn in the tissue then it should be treated after that.

senses.gloss: to be strong for, to succor, to support, to aid
to reinforce, to corroborate, to strengthen, to be strong for, to sustain
what is lopped from trees, cuttings
